results.question: Will there be no change in Fed interest rates after the June 2026 meeting?
results.ai_reasoning: Yield curve is still modestly positive, 10‑year Treasury yields are near 4.3% and T‑bill rates at 4.0%, indicating limited pressure for further tightening. With VIX low (~20) and the Fear & Greed Index neutral, market volatility is subdued, supporting the view that the Fed will hold rates steady at the June meeting.

results.question: Will WTI Crude Oil (WTI) hit (HIGH) $150 in May?
results.ai_reasoning: WTI would need to rise 114% ($70 to $150) in 27 days, representing an 8+ standard deviation move given 2.5% daily volatility - essentially unprecedented. The z-score of 5.87 confirms this is over 5 standard deviations from expected behavior, and no fundamental catalysts (supply shock, major conflict, or demand surge) are present to justify such an extreme move.
